title: No local development setup documentation
description: The README.md lacks instructions for setting up a local development environment. New developers must reverse-engineer the setup from package.json scripts and config files.

title: Missing contribution guidelines
description: No CONTRIBUTING.md or equivalent document exists to guide new contributors on branching strategy, PR process, or code review expectations.

title: No architecture decision records
description: The project lacks ADRs (Architecture Decision Records) documenting key technical decisions, making it harder for new team members to understand why certain patterns were chosen.
